issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path examples.

scenarios.name: Browser PGlite with IndexedDB persistence and full-text search
scenarios.rationale: Baseline rarely produces the @electric-sql/pglite import with dataDir: 'idb://...' plus GIN/to_tsvector/plainto_tsquery/@@ together; treatment matches the documented persistence + FTS recipe exactly.

scenarios.name: Reactive live query in React with useLiveQuery
scenarios.rationale: Baseline defaults to react-query or manual state and misses the @electric-sql/pglite/live extension plus useLiveQuery hook; treatment lifts the documented live-extension registration and React hook usage verbatim.
